feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Screen Exit for ES22 & ES21 : Add Z*field to table Control
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to add an extra Z*field as a column inside the table control in SAP std screens which will be called by tcodes ES21 & ES22.
This ZZ* field is added in table EVERH .

Screen Painter(Se51) : SAPLES20H
screen # : 0200


How do i do this?

BADI : SMOD_EMDK0001

entry.title: Hierarchy CDS view ABAP - Not able to preview
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am not unable to preview the data for the Hierarchy CDS view. It says there is some authorization checks failure. This CDS view is created in trial BTP ABAP tenant.

Followed steps are mentioned below.

1. Source custom table

2. Define Interface view entity.

3. Define parent child hierarchy.

During data preview, I am getting below Error while processing authorization checks.

 

Kindly let me know how to fix this error.

who will provide valuable solution. Reward will be provided.

Thanks a lot.

Rinkesh Narayan Gupta

entry.title: Maintain Translation App not working properly (BTP, ABAP Environment)
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I created a Service/App with RAP in BTP. For the translation of the text, the app "Maintain Translations" in the ABAP Environment Dashboard must be used. I downloaded the .xlf-file, added the desired translations, uploaded the file again and published it.

Result is, that just some texts have been translated. I'm not able to translate other texts. When I change some texts, which have been transated correctly and reupload/publish the file, the newly changed texts don't get updated again.

I'm testing the translation in the "Fiori Elements Preview App", by changing the language in the URL from EN to DE (&sap-ui-language=DE).

Does anyone know this behavior or knows how to translate correctly. Unfortunately, this is all a black box. I just can down- and upload a .xlf-file and check the result like described above.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: There is requirement from user side user want some customized reports on their Gmail id by automatio
entry.content: There is requirement from user side user want some customized reports on their Gmail id by weekly basis. We want to create an automated system. What will be requirement to achieve this task.

entry.title: API for creating Communication Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there an opportunity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to create a Communication User, Communication System, or Communication Arrangement using APIs or classes?
I only found APIs for reading on https://api.sap.com/, but I need creation.

BR,
Oleg Vokh

entry.title: ABAP Solution instance and xsuaa creation failed - ABAP MTA
entry.content:
Team,
I am trying to do the tutorial for SaaS enablement in ABAP.
Deploy and enable the SaaS application for consumer access | SAP Tutorials

Expected Output:

 



I am not able successfully create the instance for "ABAP Solution" and "XSUAA"

Below is error log 

This is the list of services post deployment

 


any inputs or right direction would be appreciated

 

Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: Child Entity Creation without update in RAP
entry.content:
Hi All,

In managed scenario, How can I ensure that a child entity is only creatable and not editable afterward in RESTful ABAP? When I remove the update capability from the behavior definition, the fields become non-editable even during the creation phase. What is the best approach to achieve this effectively? I also tried field (readonly : update) but it does not work.

entry.title: fixed column length in excel using cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix to send a internal table as excel attachment in a mail in SAP.

Able to achieve the excel - but the data is not aligned correctly, i mean i want fixed length for all the fields in excel. Also i want to colour heading of the excel fields.

CONCATENATE gv_string <dyn_wa> gc_tab gc_crlf INTO gv_string.

    TRY.
        CALL METHOD cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix
          EXPORTING
            iv_string   = gv_string
            iv_codepage = '4103'   "UTF-16LE preferred by Microsoft Excel
            iv_add_bom  = abap_true  "Byte order mark
          IMPORTING
            et_solix    = lt_string
            ev_size     = lv_size.
      CATCH cx_bcs.
        MESSAGE e445(so).
    ENDTRY.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Readiness for lower releases of S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How to check Cloud Readiness for custom code in S/4 Hana  in the lower releases <= 1709?

There is no variant ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS or SAP_CP_READINESS?

Do we need to create a Custom Variant in SCI for cloud readiness?

ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Readiness Check 

@OlgaDolinskaja 

Regards,

entry.title: OpenUI5 deployment
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

For the past few days I have been struggling with the deployment of the openui5 application to the abap test server (docker image). I tried several options, but unfortunately none of them meet my expectations. Here is some brief info about my environment and what attempts I have made:

I use VSCode + Fiori Tools, not all Fioti tools are working. i.e. I can't use fiori deployment features. I guess it's because im working on OpenUi5. All upload attempts were done on the generated "Build" folder.

The methods I tried:
1. for deployment I first tried to use this guide:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/deploy-ui5-application-into-abap-repository-using-vscode/ba-p/13495051

Upload took 11 hours and at some point I got an error and gave up.

2 The second method was to manually upload via the /UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD transaction, but here too I unfortunately failed. SAP GUI stutters on compilation at 5%. I left everything for 24 hours for testing, but nothing changed.

3. the method that, let's say, gives any results is tranzaction: /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV and using bilbiotech https://github.com/pfefferf/ui5-nwabap-deployer/blob/master/packages/ui5-nwabap-deployer-cli/README.md

With this method, the main problem is that not the entire repository deplants. After some time I get the error "Error code: ICMETIMEOU". Searching for answers on the Internet, I found information that I should increase the limits in the profile using RZ10 transaction. I did so, which caused the entire server to crash and for the next few days I struggled not to lose all my data.

The only thing left for me at this point was to repeat the deployment attempt every few minutes and upload files to the abap server.

I am very much asking you guys for information. Is there any better method to deploy openUI5 application on abap server? I have run out of ideas and don't know what to do. I also don't want to believe that deployment is so slow and clumsy.

Thank you for any help you can provide.

entry.title: SAP Application logging service
entry.content: Hi I have successfully deployed SAP Application Logging service in my cloudfoundry dev namespace. I would like to generate Secret Key to the instance. But when I try to create the Secret key the creation of key is failing and the error is as follows.

entry.title: How to put fiori app check just like SY-TCODE check in sap backend enhancement
entry.content:
In SAP Backend, when any customer exit/BADI is called from multiple tcodes then we can keep a check of SY-TCODE so that cusotmer exit code will be executed only in particular case.
Do we have similar field when calls are coming from standard fiori app? There is one customer exit getting called from 2 different fiori apps but need restriction for only 1 app.

entry.title: capm application back up from production in BTP subaccount
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Already we have to capm apps in the production subaccount and recently we did some changes to existing applications .Before we move the changes to Production we need  the production version back into BAS .Later if customer ask us to revert back to pervious version we can easily easily deploy old application.

Please let me know if any standard ways are there.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Modify Entities Execute Action in RAP
entry.content:
Hi All,

My requirement is that when a user clicks 'edit,' an action should execute based on certain conditions, and this action requires a parameter. How can we ensure that when the user clicks 'edit,' the required parameter is passed along?

entry.title: inconsistency between ckmlpp and acdoca_m_extract tables due to missing of KALNR field
entry.content:
Hi gurus, can not able to use MM03 for only one material due to costing issue.
it is throwing the following error.


Debugged the standard program and could understand that the KALNR value is missing for one material
in table CKMLPP but it is available in ACDOCA_M_EXTRACT table.

So there is inconsistency between the tables.

How to get the CKMLPP table updated with the KALNR   for the respective material in issue?

Please help me as it is urgent issue..........

We are using the latest version only .

entry.title: Connecting BTP Fiori App to Azure SQL Database Without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope everyone is doing well!

I am currently working on a project where I need to connect my SAP BTP Fiori app to an Azure SQL database to push and pull data. However, I want to achieve this without using the Integration Suite.

Has anyone successfully established such a connection, and if so, could you please share the steps or provide any guidance on how to go about it?

Any help or pointers in the right direction would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards, 

Dhairya Maradiya

entry.title: Upload pdf file with startrfc.exe
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to upload a pdf with with startrfc.exe. I know that the startrfc.exe has the function option -r to read a file. But which type of import parameter is needed in my function module?

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: SAP BTP cockpit logon
entry.content: how to logon to sap btp cockpit even if I am not assigned an administrator role for a global account

entry.title: Dynamic Destination in BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

We have developed an application in BTP environment using restful ABAP which will be consumed by various different customers. The application connects to the on premise ABAP system to fetch the data using RFC function modules. This will be achieved by creating the destination on the BTP cockpit.

Currently in the code, we are hardcoding the destination name in order to call the RFC function module from the on premise system. But the problem is , each customer may create the destination with different names , in that case how are we going to fetch the destination name dynamically ?

Appreciate your inputs. thanks in advance.

entry.title: Instance Feature Control of a field in Action button - Update
entry.content: I need all fields to be editable based on specific conditions tied to actions and data stored in a table. How can I ensure that even when attempting to modify a feature instance, all fields from the CDS are included?
